question: local area network (LAN)
canonical_answer:
A system occupying a relatively small geographic area providing
digital communications between automated data processing equipment, such as computers and
printers.

appears_in.title: Afh 33 337
appears_in.answer:
A system occupying a relatively small geographic area providing
digital communications between automated data processing equipment, such as computers and
printers.

appears_in.title: Afh 33 337 The Tongue And Quill
appears_in.answer:
A system occupying a relatively small geographic area providing
digital communications between automated data processing equipment, such as computers and
printers.

appears_in.title: Cissp Sunflower
appears_in.answer: Limited geographically to e.g. a building. Devices are sharing resources like printers, email and files. Connected through copper wire or fiber optics.

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ 1101 Flashcards
appears_in.answer:
A network that covers a relatively small area such as a building or group of buildings
(1.1 & 2.7)

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ 220 1101
appears_in.answer:
A network that covers a relatively small area such as a building or group of buildings
(1.1 & 2.7)

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Core 1 Study Guide
appears_in.answer: Connects a group of computers in close proximity, such as in an office building, school, or home

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Free Study Guide
appears_in.answer: A network that covers a relatively small area, such as a building, home, office, or campus. The typical distances are measured in hundreds of meters.

appears_in.title: Comptia A+ Material
appears_in.answer: A network that covers a relatively small area, such as a building, home, office, or campus. The typical distances are measured in hundreds of meters.

appears_in.title: Mike Meyers Comptia Videos
appears_in.answer: A network device that connects several nodes of a local area network.
